description: AXION system-wide feature flags and configuration

strict_root_safety.description: Refuse to write into system root under normal operation

require_template_hash_match.description: Require template hashes to match before generation

enforce_entrypoint_only.description: Only allow execution through designated entry points

strict_dependency_gating.description: Block operations when module dependencies not verified

emit_json_stdout.description: All scripts emit JSON to stdout for machine consumption

atomic_artifact_writes.description: Write artifacts atomically to prevent corruption
